text:
やった、持ってきてくれたのね！
これがウワサのシュタークガンの……
うん、うん、予想以上ね！

これなら、極上のコシを生み出すための
いい器具になってくれそう！

あっ、そうだ、お礼お礼！
いつもいつもありがとう！
また、よ

You brought it back for me, wonderful!
So this here comes from a Starkgun, hmm...
This should definitely do the trick!

This should help make every dish I serve feel
just perfect every time you chomp down on a
bite!

Oh, right, thank you, of course!
I really appreciate it.
I hope you come by to help again sometime!
